prompt:
Session 004 - Cinematic Performance
Asset ID: 025
Filename: 025_fear.png
Purpose: Real fear. Not horror movie fear. Someone she cares about may be gone.
Success Criteria: Eyes widen and breath stops without becoming a scream or horror expression.
Generation Guidance: 85mm portrait lens, eye level, chest-up framing, neutral dark background, soft cinematic lighting, natural skin and freckles, same dark wavy hair. Fear is immediate, personal, and believable.
Review Focus: Reject if fear becomes horror-movie acting, cartoonish surprise, glamorized vulnerability, or identity drift.
Locked references: Identity Core v1, Character Turnaround v1, Performance Core v1, Chloe Model v1.
Primary rule: Preserve Chloe exactly; only cinematic emotional state may change.
negative_prompt: Avoid theatrical acting, facial identity drift, artificial skin, changed hair, beauty-model posing, fashion styling, dramatic makeup, exaggerated emotion, childlike appearance, text, watermark.
notes: Canonical fear reference. Real fear without horror-movie exaggeration.
approval_directive: Session 004 partial approval. Asset promoted to canonical cinematic performance reference.
